detail.en: 11-module postgraduate program: Software Engineering (SOLID, design patterns, SDLC), Software Architecture (Clean Architecture with TypeScript, Microservices, Event-Driven, Hexagonal, Outbox pattern), AI Fundamentals (LLMs, RAG, AI Agents, Fine-Tuning, LangChain, LLMOps), AI-Assisted Dev Flow (Prompt Engineering, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, n8n, CodeRabbit, Claude Code), Quality & Testing (TDD with AI, Playwright E2E, Sentry, OWASP Top 10, Docs-as-Code, ADRs), Cloud & DevOps (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, GitHub Actions), DevSecOps (SSDLC, Shift-Left, CodeQL SAST, Trivy SCA, Snyk, STRIDE threat model). TFM: AxiomNode — 16-repo production microservices platform with AI engine (Python/LangChain/LLM), DevSecOps pipeline, 90% test coverage across 8 repos. Online, Spain.
detail.es: Posgrado de 11 módulos: Ingeniería de Software (SOLID, patrones de diseño, ciclo de vida), Arquitectura de Software (Clean Architecture con TypeScript, Microservicios, Event-Driven, Hexagonal, patrón Outbox), Fundamentos de IA (LLMs, RAG, Agentes IA, Fine-Tuning, LangChain, LLMOps), Flujo de Desarrollo con IA (Prompt Engineering, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, n8n, CodeRabbit, Claude Code), Calidad y Testing (TDD con IA, Playwright E2E, Sentry, OWASP Top 10, Docs-as-Code, ADRs), Cloud y DevOps (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, GitHub Actions), DevSecOps (SSDLC, Shift-Left, CodeQL SAST, Trivy SCA, Snyk, modelo de amenazas STRIDE). TFM: AxiomNode — plataforma de 16 repositorios con motor de IA (Python/LangChain/LLM), pipeline DevSecOps, 90% de cobertura en 8 repos. Online, España.
